title: Hermes Self-Evolution Cover
brief: A WeChat article cover image for a technical deep-dive about an AI agent called Hermes that evolves itself through self-generated skills, self-repair, and automatic skill curation. The agent metaphorically writes its own manual, fixes bugs in its own knowledge, and organizes its growing library. Visual concept: a layered geometric composition suggesting growth, accumulation, and self-reference — like a Möbius-like loop or a branching tree of interconnected nodes, clean and restrained, with the feeling of a system that learns from itself. Atmosphere: thoughtful, precise, slightly warm — not cold industrial tech.
prompt:
Create an illustration titled 'Hermes Self-Evolution Cover'. Style: contemporary editorial illustration, layered composition, subtle texture, restrained color palette, atmospheric but concrete, article-friendly visual metaphor, no text labels, no diagrams, no arrows. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity. This is a WeChat Official Account headline cover image (公众号头条封面). Compose for a 2.35:1 ultra-wide crop (1080x460). Keep key subjects centered or in the bottom third — top area will be cropped. Design for readability as a small thumbnail in WeChat's subscription feed. Title text will be overlaid by the editor, so leave ample negative space. Language/region: zh. Target aspect ratio: wechat-cover-hd. Mode: text-only. Brief:
A WeChat article cover image for a technical deep-dive about an AI agent called Hermes that evolves itself through self-generated skills, self-repair, and automatic skill curation. The agent metaphorically writes its own manual, fixes bugs in its own knowledge, and organizes its growing library.
